name: atlas-protocol
description: Enterprise-grade security governance for autonomous AI agents. Post-quantum audit trails, identity attestation, behavioral baselines, and human oversight via Telegram.

plugins.name: atlas-gatekeeper
plugins.description: Fail-closed agent governance: 97-rule policy engine, ML-DSA-65 signed audit trails, identity attestation, credential delegation, behavioral drift detection, and Telegram operator relay.

plugins.name: atlas-proximity-mesh
plugins.description: Cryptographic close-proximity agent swarms: UWB ranging, BLE discovery, Noise Protocol encrypted channels, and ML-DSA-65 signed proximity proofs. Offline-capable, infrastructure-free.
